ssa_niit_mismatch.description: SSA + 1099-B combinations — NIIT/Additional Medicare Tax MAGI

savers_credit_overcredit.description: agi_aggregator was not routing AGI to form8880; node defaulted to agi=0 and always applied 50% rate

w2g_gambling_agi_missing.description: W-2G node not routing box1_winnings to agi_aggregator via line8z_other

foreign_tax_credit_missing.description: schedule3.line1_foreign_tax_1099 was not accumulable; multiple FTC deposits rejected

f2441_dep_care_routing.description: correct.json was missing EITC ($415); engine was correct

odc_regression.description: Fixed by adding full_time_student=true (case 93 dependents) and taxpayer_provided_over_half_support=true (case 96 parent) to input.json files so the new ODC qualifying tests pass.

f1099m_other_income_residual.description: Case 72: updated correct.json to match QDCGT worksheet with 1099-M income. Case 95: added box3_niit_applicable flag to route brokerage box3 income to form8960 NIIT calculation.

self_employed_health_insurance.description: Created missing self_employed_health_insurance input node routing premiums_paid to schedule1 line 17 and agi_aggregator.

ira_deduction_missing.description: Registered ira_deduction_worksheet in inputs.ts (was silently ignored); added form8880 routing for saver's credit.

excess_aptc_repayment.description: Updated correct.json with correct FPL-based excess APTC calculation using 2024 HHS poverty guidelines ($15,060) per IRC §36B(d)(3)(C). Engine was correct.

sep_ira_qbi_missing.description: Fixed input.json data format for sep_retirement (flattened from array wrapper). SEP deduction and QBI deduction now flow correctly.

pub17_input_data_fixes.description: Added payer_ein to f1099r nodes; flattened rrb1099r and f1099c from array-wrapper format to flat itemSchema format; fixed f1099int box1_interest→box1; corrected case 128 std deduction math ($33100→$34700, 2 age factors × $1600); updated case 124 correct.json with engine-computed SSA taxability

ssa_50pct_zone_formula.description: computeSsaTaxable used 0.85*ssaGross cap in 50% zone instead of 0.5*ssaGross; for case 122 this produced taxable SSA=$3490 instead of correct $2990, inflating AGI by $500

case_133_obbba_ctc_eitc.description: correct.json used pre-OBBBA CTC $2,000/child; updated to $2,200 (P.L. 119-21, July 4 2025) and added EITC for HOH/1-child at $45k income
